patreon.title: Support Our Project on Patreon
patreon.description: By supporting our project on Patreon, you directly contribute to improving the well-being of our Sulcata and Radiata tortoises. Your support is not about selling animals, but about funding habitat optimization, food quality, and essential care to ensure they lead a healthy and balanced life. Currently situated in a rented space with limited room, a larger terrain—rented or owned—would allow us to offer our tortoises an environment closer to their natural habitat, promoting their health and growth. To join this journey, I will regularly post photos and update their weight tracking, a key health indicator, so you can see the tangible impact of your contribution. This tracking naturally encourages ongoing support to best accompany their growth and daily well-being.
